examples: Thus is his cheek the map of days outworn.
We understand that outworn programs are inadequate to the needs of our time.
True they have tried, but their efforts have been cast in the pattern of an outworn tradition.
West Bengal's government sees the rickshaw trade as an outworn symbol of the colonial yoke.
Robert Feild, of Harvard, praised him for undermining the outworn distinction between high art and popular culture.
